svg.title: Child Lock And Access Auth To Door RL Unlock Gate Signal Flow

g.text: Child Lock And Access Auth To Door RL Unlock Gate Signal Flow
(door control + child-lock + access authorization -> DOOR_RL unlock gate)
parked vehicle and dkey/immo auth valid
1. Door control, vehicle, digital-key, and immobilizer context reach DOOR_RL
2. DOOR_RL resolves access authorization and child-lock posture
3. Unlock request is gated by park state and child-lock release
4. DOOR_RL publishes final rear-left door lock state
